# MediaGo - Free Client-Side Media Converter

Secure, client-side, browser-only file converter that processes all files locally using WebAssembly (FFmpeg) and browser APIs. No files are uploaded to any server.

## Features
- Convert image formats: JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, HEIC, SVG.
- Convert video/audio formats: MP4, MOV, AVI, WEBM to GIF, WebM, MP3.
- Parameter adjustment: scale/resize, quality slider, framerate controls.
- Safe, private, and fully client-side.

## Technical Details
- Runs inside browser sandboxed environment.
- Utilizes `@ffmpeg/ffmpeg` (WASM) and browser Canvas/`heic2any` APIs.
- Routing is virtual under client-side React router; all conversion paths point to the main client app.
